scripts.flash-totem: bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash totem left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash totem right -y
scripts.flash-eyelash: bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash eyelash left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash eyelash right -y
scripts.flash-corne: bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash corne left -y && bun --cwd apps/cli index.ts flash corne right -y
scripts.draw-all: bun draw-iris && bun draw-corne && bun draw-eyelash && bun draw-totem
